questions.q: By what nickname is the Hindi film actor and producer Aamir Khan popularly known in the industry?
questions.explanation: Aamir Khan is widely called 'Mr. Perfectionist' for his meticulous, selective approach to choosing and making films.

questions.q: In which year was the actor Aamir Khan born?
questions.explanation: Aamir Khan was born on 14 March 1965 in Mumbai.

questions.q: In which 2001 period sports drama did Aamir Khan play a villager named Bhuvan who leads a cricket team against British officers?
questions.explanation: Aamir Khan starred as Bhuvan and also produced Lagaan, directed by Ashutosh Gowariker in 2001.

questions.q: In the 2009 film 3 Idiots, what is the name of the engineering student character played by Aamir Khan?
questions.explanation: Aamir Khan played Ranchoddas 'Rancho' Chanchad in Rajkumar Hirani's 3 Idiots (2009).

questions.q: In which 2007 film, also his directorial debut, did Aamir Khan play a teacher who helps a dyslexic boy?
questions.explanation: Taare Zameen Par (2007) marked Aamir Khan's directorial debut, in which he played art teacher Ram Shankar Nikumbh.

questions.q: In the 2016 biographical film Dangal, Aamir Khan portrayed the father of which real-life family of wrestlers?
questions.explanation: Aamir Khan played wrestler-coach Mahavir Singh Phogat in Dangal (2016), based on the Phogat wrestling family.

questions.q: Which 1988 romantic film, opposite Juhi Chawla, was Aamir Khan's breakthrough as a leading man?
questions.explanation: Qayamat Se Qayamat Tak (1988), opposite Juhi Chawla, made Aamir Khan a star early in his career.

questions.q: In the 2008 action thriller Ghajini, what condition does Aamir Khan's character Sanjay Singhania suffer from?
questions.explanation: In Ghajini (2008), Aamir Khan's character suffers from anterograde amnesia, a form of short-term memory loss.

questions.q: Aamir Khan hosted which acclaimed Indian television talk show that addressed social issues, first aired in 2012?
questions.explanation: Aamir Khan hosted Satyamev Jayate, a social-issues talk show that premiered in 2012.

questions.q: Which religious satire, released in 2014, featured Aamir Khan as an alien questioning superstition on Earth?
questions.explanation: In PK (2014), directed by Rajkumar Hirani, Aamir Khan played an alien who questions religious blind faith.

questions.q: Aamir Khan's 2008 film Ghajini is noted as the first Hindi film to cross which domestic box-office milestone?
questions.explanation: Ghajini (2008) was the first Hindi film to gross over 100 crore at the domestic box office.

questions.q: Who directed the 2006 film Rang De Basanti, in which Aamir Khan played the character Daljit 'DJ'?
questions.explanation: Rang De Basanti (2006) was directed by Rakeysh Omprakash Mehra, with Aamir Khan as DJ.

questions.q: Aamir Khan made his film acting debut as a child actor in which 1973 film directed by his uncle Nasir Hussain?
questions.explanation: Aamir Khan appeared as a child actor in Yaadon Ki Baaraat (1973), directed by his uncle Nasir Hussain.

questions.q: Which production company did Aamir Khan co-found, which produced films such as Taare Zameen Par and Dangal?
questions.explanation: Aamir Khan Productions produced Lagaan, Taare Zameen Par, Dangal and other films.

questions.q: In which 1996 romantic drama did Aamir Khan play a wealthy man posing as a taxi driver, opposite Karisma Kapoor?
questions.explanation: Raja Hindustani (1996) paired Aamir Khan with Karisma Kapoor and was one of the biggest hits of that year.

questions.q: In the 1999 patriotic action film Sarfarosh, what profession did Aamir Khan's character Ajay Singh Rathod hold?
questions.explanation: In Sarfarosh (1999), Aamir Khan played ACP Ajay Singh Rathod, a determined police officer fighting terrorism.

questions.q: Lagaan (2001), produced by and starring Aamir Khan, was nominated in which category at the Academy Awards?
questions.explanation: Lagaan was nominated for the Academy Award for Best Foreign Language Film at the 2002 Oscars.

questions.q: In the 2009 film 3 Idiots, which phrase does Aamir Khan's character popularize to encourage staying calm?
questions.explanation: Rancho, played by Aamir Khan in 3 Idiots, repeatedly uses the phrase 'All is well' to calm anxiety.

questions.q: Which actress played the female lead opposite Aamir Khan in the 2009 film 3 Idiots?
questions.explanation: Kareena Kapoor played Pia Sahastrabudhhe, the love interest of Aamir Khan's character Rancho, in 3 Idiots (2009).

questions.q: In the 2001 multi-starrer Dil Chahta Hai, directed by Farhan Akhtar, who did Aamir Khan play?
questions.explanation: Aamir Khan played the carefree Akash Malhotra in Farhan Akhtar's Dil Chahta Hai (2001).

questions.q: Aamir Khan starred as a circus performer in which 2013 installment of a popular action film franchise?
questions.explanation: Aamir Khan played the dual-role antagonist Sahir/Samar in Dhoom 3 (2013).

questions.q: Which 2017 film produced by Aamir Khan, in which he also had a key supporting role, told the story of an aspiring singer in Mumbai?
questions.explanation: Secret Superstar (2017), produced by Aamir Khan, featured him as music composer Shakti Kumaarr.

questions.q: For which 1996 film did Aamir Khan win his first Filmfare Award for Best Actor?
questions.explanation: Aamir Khan won his first Filmfare Award for Best Actor for his performance in Raja Hindustani (1996).

questions.q: Which civilian honour did the Government of India confer upon Aamir Khan in 2010?
questions.explanation: Aamir Khan received the Padma Bhushan in 2010, having earlier received the Padma Shri in 2003.

questions.q: In the 1992 sports drama Jo Jeeta Wohi Sikandar, what competitive event forms the film's climax involving Aamir Khan's character?
questions.explanation: Jo Jeeta Wohi Sikandar (1992) climaxes with an inter-college cycle race won by Aamir Khan's character Sanjay.

questions.q: Who composed the music for Aamir Khan's productions Lagaan, Rang De Basanti and Ghajini?
questions.explanation: A. R. Rahman composed the scores and songs for Lagaan, Rang De Basanti and Ghajini.

questions.q: In the 2012 thriller Talaash: The Answer Lies Within, what was the profession of Aamir Khan's character Surjan Singh Shekhawat?
questions.explanation: In Talaash (2012), Aamir Khan played Inspector Surjan Singh Shekhawat investigating a mysterious case.

questions.q: Aamir Khan's 2005 film Mangal Pandey: The Rising depicted a sepoy associated with which historical event?
questions.explanation: Mangal Pandey: The Rising (2005) portrayed the sepoy whose actions helped spark the Indian Rebellion of 1857.

questions.q: Dangal (2016), starring Aamir Khan, became a massive success particularly in which overseas market?
questions.explanation: Dangal earned a substantial share of its worldwide gross in China, making it one of India's highest-grossing films globally.

questions.q: Aamir Khan's 2022 film Laal Singh Chaddha was an official Hindi adaptation of which Hollywood film?
questions.explanation: Laal Singh Chaddha (2022) was an official Hindi remake of the 1994 American film Forrest Gump.
